About Organization

The State Bank of India is a leading public sector bank in India.

As per official notification, the bank has released a recruitment notification for Assistant Manager Law and Deputy Manager Law positions.

About the Programme

The SBI Assistant Manager Law, Deputy Manager Law Recruitment 2026 is a job opportunity for law graduates to start their career in the banking sector.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for Assistant Manager Law and Deputy Manager Law positions in the bank.
